info.title: Lengow API
info.description: Lengow API is a REST-based API that allows you to list and retrieve orders, execute actions on orders (acceptance, shipment, cancellation, refund), display marketplace actions, retrieve invoice documents, and communicate with Zalando warehouse.

bearerAuth.description: Token obtained from /access/get_token endpoint. Valid for one hour.

type.description: Type of tax ID supplied by buyer during checkout

id.description: The actual tax ID for the buyer

post.description: Authenticate with your access_token and secret to receive a session token valid for one hour.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders with optional filters and ordering. By default, filters on orders from the last 7 days.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with '-' for descending order.

parameters.name: set_currency
parameters.description: ISO 4217 currency code to convert amounts

parameters.name: merchant_order_id
parameters.description: Filter by merchant order identifier. Use 'None' to get unimported orders.

parameters.name: lengow_line_status
parameters.description: Filter by the status of the order line

parameters.name: marketplace_order_date_from
parameters.description: Filter orders placed from this date (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: marketplace_order_date_to
parameters.description: Filter orders placed up to this date (ISO 8601)

patch.description: Set the merchant internal order ID in Lengow to mark orders as imported and avoid duplicates.

200.description: Order object with updated merchant ID

post.summary: Create an action on an order
post.description: Create an asynchronous action (accept, refuse, ship, cancel, refund, etc.) on a given order. Actions are retried up to 5 times on failure.

get.description: Check if order actions have been processed by the marketplace. Use queued=false&processed=false to identify failed actions.
Returns the complete list of possible actions authorized by each marketplace, including allowed statuses, mandatory/optional parameters, carriers, and shipping methods.

200.description: Map of marketplace code to marketplace details

get.description: Download the last report issued after product transmission to a marketplace. Returns a pipe-separated CSV file. Rate limited to 10 requests per minute.
Download an invoice or delivery document by its ID. First retrieve the doc_id from the order's 'documents' array, then use this endpoint to download.

parameters.name: doc_id
parameters.description: Document identifier from the order's documents array

get.description: Retrieve available ZFS document types for a given feed.

get.summary: List ZFS reports of a specific type
get.description: List available reports of a specific document type (e.g. zfs-item-quantity-snapshot) for a given feed.

200.description: Map of document ID to document metadata

get.description: Download a specific ZFS stock report by document ID.

post.description: Upload an invoice PDF to be forwarded to Amazon (VCS) or Mirakl marketplaces. For Mirakl, metadata fields document_number, issue_date, due_date, total_amount_excluding_taxes, and total_tax_amount are required.

metadata.description: JSON string with doc_type, DocumentId, ShippingId (Amazon) or document_number, issue_date, due_date, total_amount_excluding_taxes, total_tax_amount (Mirakl)

post.description: Create a shipping notice to send products to Zalando warehouses.

get.description: Get all shipping notices for a given feed.
Retrieve a specific shipping notice by ID.

post.description: Create a list of announced items (EANs and quantities) that you intend to ship. Only onboarded EANs are accepted.

200.description: Shipping notice updated with SHIPMENT_CONTENT_ANNOUNCED status

get.description: List the announced item sets for a given shipping notice.

post.description: Update the announced item set with new EANs and quantities.
Confirm the announced item set. No request body required. Sets status to SHIPMENT_CONTENT_CONFIRMED.
Create dispatch items to ship. Requires shipping notice lengow_status to be SHIPMENT_AWAITED first.

200.description: Shipping notice updated with SHIPMENT_PREPARATION status

get.description: List dispatched item sets for a given shipping notice.

post.description: Update the dispatch item set with new EANs and quantities.
Confirm the dispatch. No request body required. Sets status to SHIPMENT_SHIPPED.

get.description: Track a given shipping notice. Corresponds to the Zalando Tours API.
Returns the available stock movement resource types and their required/optional parameters.

200.description: Available resources with their required and optional parameters

get.description: Retrieve ZFS stock movements. Resource types: received_items, returned_items, intra_community_movements, liquidated_items. Data retention: 100 days.
Retrieve Amazon VAT Invoice Data Report for invoices and credit notes. Only available if the Amazon VCS App is activated. Lengow retrieves VIDR every 2 hours for the last 30 days.

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: List, retrieve, and perform actions on marketplace orders

tags.name: Marketplaces
tags.description: Retrieve marketplace information and product reports

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Retrieve invoices, delivery documents, and ZFS stock reports

tags.name: Zalando Fulfillment Solutions
tags.description: Manage ZFS logistics: shipping notices, item sets, stock movements

tags.name: Amazon VCS
tags.description: Amazon VAT Calculation Service — retrieve VIDR and upload invoices
